coaching.title: Today's Run
coaching.message: Build Phase, 15 weeks to Kranjska Gora. Tuesday is for vert: 75 min with 6x90sec uphill repeats at hard effort (Zone 4), full walk recovery between. Find the steepest sustained grade you can on today's route — Julian Alps will throw 2,500m at you, and your quads need to learn to push and brake. Cool down on flat ground.

coaching.title: Fuel Right
coaching.message: Train the gut. On today's hill session, practice race fueling: 60-80g carbs/hour starting at minute 30. Use the actual gel or chew you'll race with (Maurten 100 or Precision PF30). Sip 500ml water with electrolytes. The gut is a trainable organ — 15 weeks out is exactly when to dial this in, not race week.

coaching.title: Recovery
coaching.message: Travel days hammer recovery harder than miles. Tonight: 10 minutes of legs-up-the-wall before bed to flush the quads after hill work, then aim for 8 hours horizontal. If you're hopping time zones this week, anchor sleep to local sunrise — that single cue does more for circadian recovery than melatonin.

coaching.title: Mental Edge
coaching.message: 108 days out. The work you do this month is what you'll feel in your legs at kilometer 35 in Slovenia, when the alpine air thins and the descent burns. Build Phase isn't glamorous — it's deposits in an account you'll withdraw on September 18th. Today's hills are tomorrow's confidence. Stack them quietly.
